title: US-Iran deal opens window for Yemen peace: UN envoy

snapshot.title: US-Iran deal opens window for Yemen peace: UN envoy
snapshot.description: NEW YORK: The US-Iran nuclear deal has created a potential turning point for Yemen’s long-stalled peace process, the UN’s special envoy for Yemen told the Security Council on Tuesday, urging the warring parties to capitalize on the rare moment of regional calm. Briefing the 15-member council on the latest developments in the conflict, Hans Grundberg said the deal between
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: US-Iran deal opens window for Yemen peace: UN envoy | Arab News
